gauge.name: Walker Creek (Marin) near Marshall

impacts.statement: Major Flood Stage.  Major floodplain inundation in the Marin Ranch Camp area near Walker Creek.  NWS will issue a Flash Flood Warning if not yet already issued.
Moderate Flood Stage.  Access road on NW side (right bank) of Walker Creek near Marin Ranch Camp begins to be flooded.  Travel through area restricted and dangerous.
Minor Flood Stage.  Minor floodplain inundation on right bank side (NWS side of channel) near Marin Ranch Camp.  NWS will issue a Flood Advisory if not yet already issued.
Monitor Stage.  Water levels 2 feet below flood stage.  NWS will issue a Flash Flood Watch if not yet already issued.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Graphical forecasts are not available during times of high water, forecast crest information can be found in the local WFO web page.
